Cmd:
mount -t tmpfs tmpfs /run \
         && mkdir -p /run/sshd \
         && mkdir -p /workspace \
         && mount -t virtiofs workspace /workspace \
         && chmod 755 /var/empty \
         && Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1920x1080x24 -ac & \
         sleep 1 \
         && openbox --replace & \
         sleep 1 \
         && exec /usr/sbin/sshd -D -e -o StrictModes=no
